options.content:
# GroundTruth-KB Dashboard

SQLite-backed project health, setup, delivery, and operations view.
[Manual refresh](http://127.0.0.1:8766/) | `memory/gtkb-dashboard.sqlite` | `scripts\gtkb_dashboard\start_local_dashboard.ps1`

panels.title: Project Health Issues

targets.queryText: SELECT value FROM current_metrics WHERE metric_key = 'project_health_issues';
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT value FROM current_metrics WHERE metric_key = 'project_health_issues';

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(MAX(COALESCE(completed_at, started_at)))) * 24 * 60 AS INTEGER) AS "Refreshed (m ago)" FROM refresh_runs;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(MAX(COALESCE(completed_at, started_at)))) * 24 * 60 AS INTEGER) AS "Refreshed (m ago)" FROM refresh_runs;

panels.description: Freshness: minutes since the most recent `refresh_runs.completed_at` (falls back to `started_at`). Secondary value `Refreshed (m ago)` comes from target `F`.

panels.title: Release Blockers

targets.queryText: SELECT value FROM current_metrics WHERE metric_key = 'release_blockers';
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT value FROM current_metrics WHERE metric_key = 'release_blockers';

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(MAX(COALESCE(completed_at, started_at)))) * 24 * 60 AS INTEGER) AS "Refreshed (m ago)" FROM refresh_runs;

panels.title: Documented Setup Steps

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM setup_steps;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM setup_steps;

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(MAX(COALESCE(completed_at, started_at)))) * 24 * 60 AS INTEGER) AS "Refreshed (m ago)" FROM refresh_runs;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(MAX(COALESCE(completed_at, started_at)))) * 24 * 60 AS INTEGER) AS "Refreshed (m ago)" FROM refresh_runs;

panels.description: Freshness: minutes since the most recent `refresh_runs.completed_at` (falls back to `started_at`). Secondary value `Refreshed (m ago)` comes from target `F`.

targets.queryText:
SELECT label AS metric,
                       CASE lower(status)
                           WHEN 'red' THEN 2
                           WHEN 'yellow' THEN 1
                           ELSE 0
                       END AS value
                FROM health_cards
                ORDER BY sort_order;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT label AS metric,
                       CASE lower(status)
                           WHEN 'red' THEN 2
                           WHEN 'yellow' THEN 1
                           ELSE 0
                       END AS value
                FROM health_cards
                ORDER BY sort_order;

targets.queryText:
SELECT upper(COALESCE(NULLIF(severity, ''), 'unknown')) AS severity,
                       COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM action_center
                GROUP BY severity
                ORDER BY value DESC, severity;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT upper(COALESCE(NULLIF(severity, ''), 'unknown')) AS severity,
                       COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM action_center
                GROUP BY severity
                ORDER BY value DESC, severity;

targets.queryText:
SELECT label AS metric, value
                FROM quality_rollup
                WHERE label <> 'Total'
                ORDER BY sort_order;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT label AS metric, value
                FROM quality_rollup
                WHERE label <> 'Total'
                ORDER BY sort_order;

targets.queryText:
SELECT display_name AS metric,
                       CASE lower(health)
                           WHEN 'red' THEN 2
                           WHEN 'yellow' THEN 1
                           WHEN 'failing' THEN 2
                           WHEN 'manual' THEN 1
                           ELSE 0
                       END AS value
                FROM integration_status
                ORDER BY sort_order;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT display_name AS metric,
                       CASE lower(health)
                           WHEN 'red' THEN 2
                           WHEN 'yellow' THEN 1
                           WHEN 'failing' THEN 2
                           WHEN 'manual' THEN 1
                           ELSE 0
                       END AS value
                FROM integration_status
                ORDER BY sort_order;

targets.queryText:
SELECT generated_at AS time, metric_label AS metric, value
                FROM kpi_snapshots
                WHERE value IS NOT NULL
                ORDER BY generated_at, metric_label;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT generated_at AS time, metric_label AS metric, value
                FROM kpi_snapshots
                WHERE value IS NOT NULL
                ORDER BY generated_at, metric_label;

targets.queryText:
SELECT sort_order,
                   upper(severity) AS severity,
                   action,
                   owner_lane AS lane,
                   shortcut_target
            FROM action_center
            ORDER BY sort_order
            LIMIT 5;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT sort_order,
                   upper(severity) AS severity,
                   action,
                   owner_lane AS lane,
                   shortcut_target
            FROM action_center
            ORDER BY sort_order
            LIMIT 5;

targets.queryText:
SELECT section AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM setup_steps
                GROUP BY section
                ORDER BY MIN(sort_order);
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT section AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM setup_steps
                GROUP BY section
                ORDER BY MIN(sort_order);

targets.queryText:
SELECT category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM required_tools
                GROUP BY category
                ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, category;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM required_tools
                GROUP BY category
                ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, category;

targets.queryText:
SELECT category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM third_party_services
                GROUP BY category
                ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, category;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM third_party_services
                GROUP BY category
                ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, category;

targets.queryText:
SELECT label || ' - ' || latest_result AS metric,
                   event_count AS value
            FROM delivery_timeline_summary
            ORDER BY sort_order;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT label || ' - ' || latest_result AS metric,
                   event_count AS value
            FROM delivery_timeline_summary
            ORDER BY sort_order;

targets.queryText: SELECT sort_order, blocker FROM release_blockers ORDER BY sort_order;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT sort_order, blocker FROM release_blockers ORDER BY sort_order;

targets.queryText:
SELECT upper(COALESCE(NULLIF(severity, ''), 'unknown')) AS severity,
                       COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM risk_register
                GROUP BY severity
                ORDER BY value DESC, severity;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT upper(COALESCE(NULLIF(severity, ''), 'unknown')) AS severity,
                       COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM risk_register
                GROUP BY severity
                ORDER BY value DESC, severity;

targets.queryText:
SELECT upper(COALESCE(NULLIF(health, ''), 'unknown')) AS health,
                       COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM integration_status
                GROUP BY health
                ORDER BY value DESC, health;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT upper(COALESCE(NULLIF(health, ''), 'unknown')) AS health,
                       COUNT(*) AS value
                FROM integration_status
                GROUP BY health
                ORDER BY value DESC, health;

targets.queryText: SELECT sort_order, section, title, instruction, command, link_label, link_url FROM setup_steps ORDER BY sort_order;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT sort_order, section, title, instruction, command, link_label, link_url FROM setup_steps ORDER BY sort_order;

targets.queryText: SELECT metric_label AS metric, value, upper(status) AS status, description FROM current_metrics ORDER BY metric_key;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT metric_label AS metric, value, upper(status) AS status, description FROM current_metrics ORDER BY metric_key;

targets.queryText:
SELECT generated_at AS time, metric_label AS metric, value
            FROM kpi_snapshots
            WHERE value IS NOT NULL
            ORDER BY generated_at, metric_label;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT generated_at AS time, metric_label AS metric, value
            FROM kpi_snapshots
            WHERE value IS NOT NULL
            ORDER BY generated_at, metric_label;

targets.queryText: SELECT label, value FROM data_freshness ORDER BY key;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT label, value FROM data_freshness ORDER BY key;

targets.queryText:
SELECT id, started_at, completed_at, status, error
            FROM refresh_runs
            ORDER BY id DESC
            LIMIT 20;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT id, started_at, completed_at, status, error
            FROM refresh_runs
            ORDER BY id DESC
            LIMIT 20;
